content:
📌 2.2 Section Components

Each section follows this standard layout:

📂 | X.X | Week X | [Section Title] | [Type]

📌 Overview
• Brief summary of the purpose of this section.
• Clearly state key takeaways in a few sentences.
• Explain how it connects to the weekly theme.

📌 Key Themes & Questions

✔ Key Themes: (Bullet points summarizing learning objectives.)
✔ Key Questions: (Guiding questions for student reflection.)

📂 Canvas Content

📂 Title:

"Week X | [Section Name]"

📂 Heading:

"[Descriptive Title from Canvas]"
context: From document: ENG 101 | Course Content Formatting & Protocols — chunk 4 (chunk 4/8)
